verses.latin_vulgate: Vixit autem Sara centum viginti septem annis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּהְיוּ֙ חַיֵּ֣י שָׂרָ֔ה מֵאָ֥ה שָׁנָ֛ה וְעֶשְׂרִ֥ים שָׁנָ֖ה וְשֶׁ֣בַע שָׁנִ֑ים שְׁנֵ֖י חַיֵּ֥י שָׂרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Sara lived a hundred and twenty-seven years.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Saaran elinaika oli sata ja seitsemänkolmattakymmentä ajastaikaa: ne olivat Saaran ikävuodet.
verses.king_james: And Sarah was an hundred and seven and twenty years old: these were the years of the life of Sarah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mortua est in civitate Arbee, quæ est Hebron, in terra Chanaan : venitque Abraham ut plangeret et fleret eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתָּ֣מׇת שָׂרָ֗ה בְּקִרְיַ֥ת אַרְבַּ֛ע הִ֥וא חֶבְר֖וֹן בְּאֶ֣רֶץ כְּנָ֑עַן וַיָּבֹא֙ אַבְרָהָ֔ם לִסְפֹּ֥ד לְשָׂרָ֖ה וְלִבְכֹּתָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she died in the city of Arbee which is Hebron, in the land of Chanaan: and Abraham came to mourn and weep for her.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Saara kuoli Arban kaupungissa, joka (on) Hebron Kanaanin maalla. Niin tuli Abraham murehtimaan Saaraa ja itkemään häntä.
verses.king_james: And Sarah died in Kirjath–arba; the same is Hebron in the land of Canaan: and Abraham came to mourn for Sarah, and to weep for her.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque surrexisset ab officio funeris, locutus est ad filios Heth, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֙קׇם֙ אַבְרָהָ֔ם מֵעַ֖ל פְּנֵ֣י מֵת֑וֹ וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר אֶל־בְּנֵי־חֵ֖ת לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And after he rose up from the funeral obsequies, he spoke to the children of Heth, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte nousi hän kuolleensa tyköä; ja puhui Hetin lapsille sanoen:
verses.king_james: And Abraham stood up from before his dead, and spake unto the sons of Heth, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Advena sum et peregrinus apud vos : date mihi jus sepulchri vobiscum, ut sepeliam mortuum meum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גֵּר־וְתוֹשָׁ֥ב אָנֹכִ֖י עִמָּכֶ֑ם תְּנ֨וּ לִ֤י אֲחֻזַּת־קֶ֙בֶר֙ עִמָּכֶ֔ם וְאֶקְבְּרָ֥ה מֵתִ֖י מִלְּפָנָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I am a stranger and sojourner among you: give me the right of a burying place with you, that I may bury my dead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen muukalainen ja kuitenkin asuvainen teidän tykönänne, antakaat minulle perintöhauta teidän tykönänne, haudatakseni minun kuolleeni, joka on minun edessäni.
verses.king_james: I am a stranger and a sojourner with you: give me a possession of a buryingplace with you, that I may bury my dead out of my sight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Responderunt filii Heth, dicentes :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲנ֧וּ בְנֵי־חֵ֛ת אֶת־אַבְרָהָ֖ם לֵאמֹ֥ר לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The children of Heth answered, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin vastasivat Hetin lapset Abrahamia, sanoen hänelle:
verses.king_james: And the children of Heth answered Abraham, saying unto him,

verses.latin_vulgate: Audi nos, domine : princeps Dei es apud nos : in electis sepulchris nostris sepeli mortuum tuum, nullusque te prohibere poterit quin in monumento ejus sepelias mortuum tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁמָעֵ֣נוּ ׀ אֲדֹנִ֗י נְשִׂ֨יא אֱלֹהִ֤ים אַתָּה֙ בְּתוֹכֵ֔נוּ בְּמִבְחַ֣ר קְבָרֵ֔ינוּ קְבֹ֖ר אֶת־מֵתֶ֑ךָ אִ֣ישׁ מִמֶּ֔נּוּ אֶת־קִבְר֛וֹ לֹֽא־יִכְלֶ֥ה מִמְּךָ֖ מִקְּבֹ֥ר מֵתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: My lord, hear us, thou art a prince of God among us: bury thy dead in our principal sepulchres: and no man shall have power to hinder thee from burying thy dead in his sepulchre.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuule meitä, rakas herra: sinä olet Jumalan ruhtinas meidän seassamme, hautaa sinun kuollees meidän parhaisiin hautoihimme: ei yksikään meistä sinua kiellä hautaamasta kuolluttas hänen hautaansa.
verses.king_james: Hear us, my lord: thou art a mighty prince among us: in the choice of our sepulchres bury thy dead; none of us shall withhold from thee his sepulchre, but that thou mayest bury thy dead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surrexit Abraham, et adoravit populum terræ, filios videlicet Heth :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֧קׇם אַבְרָהָ֛ם וַיִּשְׁתַּ֥חוּ לְעַם־הָאָ֖רֶץ לִבְנֵי־חֵֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Abraham rose up, and bowed down to the people of the land, to wit, the children of Heth:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Abraham nousi ja kumarsi itsensä maan kansan edessä, (nimittäin) Hetin lasten edessä.
verses.king_james: And Abraham stood up, and bowed himself to the people of the land, even to the children of Heth.

verses.latin_vulgate: dixitque ad eos : Si placet animæ vestræ ut sepeliam mortuum meum, audite me, et intercedite pro me apud Ephron filium Seor :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר אִתָּ֖ם לֵאמֹ֑ר אִם־יֵ֣שׁ אֶֽת־נַפְשְׁכֶ֗ם לִקְבֹּ֤ר אֶת־מֵתִי֙ מִלְּפָנַ֔י שְׁמָע֕וּנִי וּפִגְעוּ־לִ֖י בְּעֶפְר֥וֹן בֶּן־צֹֽחַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And said to them: If it please your soul that I should bury my dead, hear me, and intercede for me to Ephron the son of Seor.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän puhui heille, sanoen: jos teidän mielenne on, että minä hautaan minun kuolleeni, joka minun edessäni on; niin kuulkaat minua, ja rukoilkaat minun edestäni Ephronia Zoarin poikaa.
verses.king_james: And he communed with them, saying, If it be your mind that I should bury my dead out of my sight; hear me, and intreat for me to Ephron the son of Zohar,

verses.latin_vulgate: ut det mihi speluncam duplicem, quam habet in extrema parte agri sui : pecunia digna tradat eam mihi coram vobis in possessionem sepulchri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִתֶּן־לִ֗י אֶת־מְעָרַ֤ת הַמַּכְפֵּלָה֙ אֲשֶׁר־ל֔וֹ אֲשֶׁ֖ר בִּקְצֵ֣ה שָׂדֵ֑הוּ בְּכֶ֨סֶף מָלֵ֜א יִתְּנֶ֥נָּה לִּ֛י בְּתוֹכְכֶ֖ם לַאֲחֻזַּת־קָֽבֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: That he may give me the double cave, which he hath in the end of his field: For as much money as it is worth he shall give it me before you, for a possession of a burying place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että hän antais minulle Makpelan luolan, joka hänellä on, vainionsa perällä: täyden hinnan edestä antakaan sen minulle teidän keskellänne perintöhaudaksi.
verses.king_james: That he may give me the cave of Machpelah, which he hath, which is in the end of his field; for as much money as it is worth he shall give it me for a possession of a buryingplace amongst you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habitabat autem Ephron in medio filiorum Heth. Responditque Ephron ad Abraham, cunctis audientibus qui ingrediebantur portam civitatis illius, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעֶפְר֥וֹן יֹשֵׁ֖ב בְּת֣וֹךְ בְּנֵי־חֵ֑ת וַיַּ֩עַן֩ עֶפְר֨וֹן הַחִתִּ֤י אֶת־אַבְרָהָם֙ בְּאׇזְנֵ֣י בְנֵי־חֵ֔ת לְכֹ֛ל בָּאֵ֥י שַֽׁעַר־עִיר֖וֹ לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now Ephron dwelt in the midst of the children of Heth. And Ephron made answer to Abraham in the hearing of all that went in at the gate of the city, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Ephron asui Hetin lasten seassa. Niin vastasi Ephron Hetiläinen Abrahamia, Hetin poikain kuullen, kaikkein sisälle ja ulos käyväisten hänen kaupunkinsa portista, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And Ephron dwelt among the children of Heth: and Ephron the Hittite answered Abraham in the audience of the children of Heth, even of all that went in at the gate of his city, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Nequaquam ita fiat, domine mi, sed tu magis ausculta quod loquor. Agrum trado tibi, et speluncam quæ in eo est, præsentibus filiis populi mei ; sepeli mortuum tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־אֲדֹנִ֣י שְׁמָעֵ֔נִי הַשָּׂדֶה֙ נָתַ֣תִּי לָ֔ךְ וְהַמְּעָרָ֥ה אֲשֶׁר־בּ֖וֹ לְךָ֣ נְתַתִּ֑יהָ לְעֵינֵ֧י בְנֵי־עַמִּ֛י נְתַתִּ֥יהָ לָּ֖ךְ קְבֹ֥ר מֵתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let it not be so, my lord, but do thou rather hearken to what I say: The field I deliver to thee, and the cave that is therein; in the presence of the children of my people, bury thy dead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei, minun herrani, vaan kuule minua; vainion minä annan sinulle, ja luolan, joka siinä on, annan minä sinulle: minun kansani lasten nähden annan minä sen sinulle; hautaa kuollees.
verses.king_james: Nay, my lord, hear me: the field give I thee, and the cave that is therein, I give it thee; in the presence of the sons of my people give I it thee: bury thy dead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adoravit Abraham coram populo terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁתַּ֙חוּ֙ אַבְרָהָ֔ם לִפְנֵ֖י עַ֥ם הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Abraham bowed down before the people of the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Abraham kumarsi maan kansan edessä.
verses.king_james: And Abraham bowed down himself before the people of the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et locutus est ad Ephron circumstante plebe : Quæso ut audias me : dabo pecuniam pro agro : suscipe eam, et sic sepeliam mortuum meum in eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֨ר אֶל־עֶפְר֜וֹן בְּאׇזְנֵ֤י עַם־הָאָ֙רֶץ֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר אַ֛ךְ אִם־אַתָּ֥ה ל֖וּ שְׁמָעֵ֑נִי נָתַ֜תִּי כֶּ֤סֶף הַשָּׂדֶה֙ קַ֣ח מִמֶּ֔נִּי וְאֶקְבְּרָ֥ה אֶת־מֵתִ֖י שָֽׁמָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he spoke to Ephron, in the presence of the people: I beseech thee to hear me: I will give money for the field; take it, and so will I bury my dead in it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja puhui Ephronille maan kansan kuullen, sanoen: jos sinä minua kuulet: minä annan rahan vainion edestä, ota se minulta, ja minä hautaan minun kuolleeni siihen.
verses.king_james: And he spake unto Ephron in the audience of the people of the land, saying, But if thou wilt give it, I pray thee, hear me: I will give thee money for the field; take it of me, and I will bury my dead there.

verses.latin_vulgate: Responditque Ephron :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֧עַן עֶפְר֛וֹן אֶת־אַבְרָהָ֖ם לֵאמֹ֥ר לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Ephron answered:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ephron vastasi Abrahamia, sanoen hänelle:
verses.king_james: And Ephron answered Abraham, saying unto him,

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine mi, audi me : terra, quam postulas, quadringentis siclis argenti valet : istud est pretium inter me et te : sed quantum est hoc ? sepeli mortuum tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲדֹנִ֣י שְׁמָעֵ֔נִי אֶ֩רֶץ֩ אַרְבַּ֨ע מֵאֹ֧ת שֶֽׁקֶל־כֶּ֛סֶף בֵּינִ֥י וּבֵֽינְךָ֖ מַה־הִ֑וא וְאֶת־מֵתְךָ֖ קְבֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: My lord, hear me. The ground which thou desirest, is worth four hundred sicles of silver: this is the price between me and thee: but what is this? bury thy dead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun herrani, kuule minua: maa maksaa neljäsataa sikliä hopiaa; vaan mitä se on minun ja sinun välilläs? hautaa sinun kuollees.
verses.king_james: My lord, hearken unto me: the land is worth four hundred shekels of silver; what is that betwixt me and thee? bury therefore thy dead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod cum audisset Abraham, appendit pecuniam, quam Ephron postulaverat, audientibus filiis Heth, quadringentos siclos argenti probatæ monetæ publicæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁמַ֣ע אַבְרָהָם֮ אֶל־עֶפְרוֹן֒ וַיִּשְׁקֹ֤ל אַבְרָהָם֙ לְעֶפְרֹ֔ן אֶת־הַכֶּ֕סֶף אֲשֶׁ֥ר דִּבֶּ֖ר בְּאׇזְנֵ֣י בְנֵי־חֵ֑ת אַרְבַּ֤ע מֵאוֹת֙ שֶׁ֣קֶל כֶּ֔סֶף עֹבֵ֖ר לַסֹּחֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Abraham had heard this, he weighed out the money that Ephron had asked, in the hearing of the children of Heth, four hundred sicles of silver, of common current money.
verses.finnish_biblia: Abraham kuuli Ephronia, ja punnitsi hänelle rahan, jonka hän nimittänyt oli Hetin lasten kuullen: neljäsataa sikliä hopiaa, käypää rahaa.
verses.king_james: And Abraham hearkened unto Ephron; and Abraham weighed to Ephron the silver, which he had named in the audience of the sons of Heth, four hundred shekels of silver, current money with the merchant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confirmatusque est ager quondam Ephronis, in quo erat spelunca duplex, respiciens Mambre, tam ipse, quam spelunca, et omnes arbores ejus in cunctis terminis ejus per circuitum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣קׇם ׀ שְׂדֵ֣ה עֶפְר֗וֹן אֲשֶׁר֙ בַּמַּכְפֵּלָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֖ר לִפְנֵ֣י מַמְרֵ֑א הַשָּׂדֶה֙ וְהַמְּעָרָ֣ה אֲשֶׁר־בּ֔וֹ וְכׇל־הָעֵץ֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּשָּׂדֶ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר בְּכׇל־גְּבֻל֖וֹ סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the field that before was Ephron's, wherein was the double cave, looking towards Mambre, both it and the cave, and all the trees thereof, in all its limits round about,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niin vahvistettiin Ephronin vainio, joka Makpelassa on Mamren kohdalla, sekä pelto että luola joka siinä on, ja kaikki puut siinä vainiossa, jotka ympäri kaikissa sen rajoissa ovat.
verses.king_james: And the field of Ephron, which was in Machpelah, which was before Mamre, the field, and the cave which was therein, and all the trees that were in the field, that were in all the borders round about, were made sure

verses.latin_vulgate: Abrahæ in possessionem, videntibus filiis Heth, et cunctis qui intrabant portam civitatis illius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְאַבְרָהָ֥ם לְמִקְנָ֖ה לְעֵינֵ֣י בְנֵי־חֵ֑ת בְּכֹ֖ל בָּאֵ֥י שַֽׁעַר־עִירֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Was made sure to Abraham for a possession, in the sight of the children of Heth, and of all that went in at the gate of his city.
verses.finnish_biblia: (Kaikki ne tulivat) Abrahamille omaisuudeksi Hetin lasten nähden: kaikkein (nähden), jotka sisällekävivät hänen kaupunkinsa portista.
verses.king_james: Unto Abraham for a possession in the presence of the children of Heth, before all that went in at the gate of his city.

verses.latin_vulgate: Atque ita sepelivit Abraham Saram uxorem suam in spelunca agri duplici, quæ respiciebat Mambre. Hæc est Hebron in terra Chanaan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחֲרֵי־כֵן֩ קָבַ֨ר אַבְרָהָ֜ם אֶת־שָׂרָ֣ה אִשְׁתּ֗וֹ אֶל־מְעָרַ֞ת שְׂדֵ֧ה הַמַּכְפֵּלָ֛ה עַל־פְּנֵ֥י מַמְרֵ֖א הִ֣וא חֶבְר֑וֹן בְּאֶ֖רֶץ כְּנָֽעַן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And so Abraham buried Sara, his wife, in the double cave of the field, that looked towards Mambre, this is Hebron in the land of Chanaan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sitte hautasi Abraham emäntänsä Saaran siihen luolaan, joka oli Makpelan vainiossa Mamren kohdalla; se on Hebron Kanaanin maalla:
verses.king_james: And after this, Abraham buried Sarah his wife in the cave of the field of Machpelah before Mamre: the same is Hebron in the land of Canaan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et confirmatus est ager, et antrum quod erat in eo, Abrahæ in possessionem monumenti a filiis Heth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֨קׇם הַשָּׂדֶ֜ה וְהַמְּעָרָ֧ה אֲשֶׁר־בּ֛וֹ לְאַבְרָהָ֖ם לַאֲחֻזַּת־קָ֑בֶר מֵאֵ֖ת בְּנֵי־חֵֽת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the field was made sure to Abraham, and the cave that was in it, for a possession to bury in, by the children of Heth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin vahvistettiin siis vainio ja luola, joka siinä oli, Abrahamille perintöhaudaksi, Hetin lapsilta.
verses.king_james: And the field, and the cave that is therein, were made sure unto Abraham for a possession of a buryingplace by the sons of Heth.
